- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [ ] Install Required Extensions
- [ ] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task
- [ ] Launch the Project
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Overview
Created an agentic CRM platform with:
- Backend API (Node.js/TypeScript/Express)
- PostgreSQL database with Sequelize ORM
- Four AI agents: Lead Qualification, Customer Support, Sales Automation, Analytics
- RESTful API for contacts, deals, and agent management
- Integrations: Salesforce, Slack, Email services
- Comprehensive logging and error handling
